title: From Herzogenaurach to the World
excerpt: How PUMA evolved from a small German sports brand into a global icon of sport and street culture.

content.content: PUMA was founded in Herzogenaurach, Germany, and grew from a small athletic footwear company into one of the most recognized sports brands worldwide. Over decades, it built credibility in football, motorsport, and athletics while shaping street culture.
"Forever Faster is not just a slogan — it is a mindset embedded in our DNA."
content.caption: John Smith

content.content:
1948 – PUMA founded in Germany
1968 – Olympic gold moments elevate brand visibility
1998 – Motorsport expansion accelerates
2020+ – Global performance & lifestyle dominance

title: The Art of Handcrafted Leather
excerpt: A journey into the meticulous craft of hand-stitched leather goods passed down through three generations of artisans.

content.content: Every piece begins with the careful selection of full-grain leather, sourced from tanneries that have served master craftsmen for over a century.
"A bag crafted by hand carries the soul of its maker."
content.caption: Maria Conti, Master Artisan

title: Summer 2025 Collection Launch
excerpt: Discover the inspiration behind our most vibrant collection yet — a celebration of Mediterranean light and colour.

content.content: Inspired by the golden hour along the Amalfi Coast, our Summer 2025 collection blends flowing silhouettes with bold, sun-kissed hues.

January – Concept sketches finalized
March – Fabric sourcing complete
May – Final collection revealed
June – Global launch
